summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 comprehensively. REQ-1 is fulfilled by the new OnboardingFlow component (name + age only, no Internet Identity), the updated App.tsx routing logic (shows onboarding when no profile exists, skips it otherwise), and the LoginScreen.tsx being effectively replaced/bypassed. REQ-2 is fulfilled by the useLocalQueries.ts hooks reading/writing profile and plans to localStorage, with plan generation working without any authenticated backend actor. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
